calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., APR-09-2009: LEONARD P. MASTROMONACO, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; PAUL NATHAN ALSO APPEARS ON BEHALF OF PROPERTY OWNER & PLAINTIFF SUNNYSIDE PROPERTIES IV, LP; LTD. SCOPE ATTORNEY RYAN J. OTIS, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT CYNTHIA TASCA, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD IN DEPT. 218, AS FOLLOWS:
AS OF 5:00 P.M. ON SUNDAY, MAY-10-2009, DEFENDANT CYNTHIA TASCA WILL VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 195 - 2ND AVENUE, #10, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA AND MAY REMAIN IN THE PREMISE UNTIL THE ABOVE-LISTED MOVE-OUT DATE. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA TASCA WILL TIMELY COMPLY WITH THE TERMS AND PROCEDURES AGREED TO BY THE POSSESSION DATE OF SUNDAY, MAY-10-2009. ALL KEYS TO THE PROPERTY ARE TO BE RETURNED TO THE PLAINTIFF OR THE PLAINTIFF'S DESIGNATED AGENT; PREMISES ARE TO BE LEFT IN A "BROOM-CLEAN" CONDITION AND IN THE SAME CONDITION AS FOUND, NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR EXCEPTED; THE BUILT-IN CLOSETS AND WIRE SHELVES BY THE KITCHEN STOVE ADDED BY DEFENDANT MAY REMAIN IN THE UNIT; ALL PERSONS RESIDING IN THE UNIT MUST VACATE BY THE POSSESSION DATE OF MAY-10-2009; DEFENDANT WAIVES THE RIGHT TO ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING IN THE PREMISE AFTER PLAINTIFF OBTAINS POSSESSION OF THE UNIT & PLAINTIFF MAY DISPOSE OF SAME; THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1,600.00 IS TO BE SENT TO DEFENDANT BY APR-16-2009 IN CHECK FORM. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE, DAMAGES OF $1,499.33 FOR JANUARY, FEBRUARY, MARCH, AND APRIL 2009 DUE & PER DIEM OF $42.29 DUE & PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES; PLAINTIFF MAY ALSO FILE A STIPULATION & OBTAIN JUDGMENT AND IMMEDIATELY INITIATE EVICTION PROCEEDINGS. A MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS IS AGREED UPON RE 1542 CCP, GENERAL RELEASE. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA TASCA INFORMS THE COURT SHE UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT REACHED THIS DATE.
JPT ROD THOMPSON; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; REPORTER: SARA LERSCHEN, C.S.R. #6213, RMR, CRR
(D-218).
